title: Docs: README with setup and run instructions
description:
Task completed successfully.

Created comprehensive README.md with:
- Clear description of what the app does (greeting users by name)
- Prerequisites section (Node.js requirement with version check commands)
- Installation instructions (npm install)
- Running instructions (npm start)
- Usage guide (open localhost:3000, enter name, see greeting)
- PORT environment variable configuration for Linux/macOS and Windows
- Project structure overview
- API endpoint documentation
- Technology stack details

The README is production-ready and provides all necessary information for users to understand, install, and run the Hello World web application.
